response:
I want 10 weaknesses of a company from 2023, and I want the 10 points to be similar to this:  
1. [Company Name]'s earnings fell [X]% from 2019 to 2020.  
2. [Company Name]'s EPS dropped [$X] in 2020 from the previous year.  
3. [Company Name]'s share prices declined [X]% from 2019 to 2020.  
4. Entirely dependent on demand for a single product or service.  
5. Total liabilities increased from [$X] to [$X] from 2018 to 2019.  
6. [Company Name] produced [X]% fewer units of a key product in the first half of 2020 due to weak demand from a specific industry sector.  
7. A competitor’s [product/service] sales increased [X]% from 2019 to 2020, while [Company Name] has no comparable offerings.  
8. A competitor achieved a specific operational goal by [date], while [Company Name] has not met a similar standard.  
9. Sales to [Company Name]’s top ten customers represented approximately [X]% of their net sales during fiscal year 2019.  
10. [Company Name] faces multiple pending lawsuits in 2020, including allegations related to [specific legal issues].
